title: Brazilian Banana Curry Bites
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dessert that combines the sweetness of bananas with the warmth of a Brazilian-inspired curry.

ingredients.name: Dense
ingredients.notes: Dense cake crumbs or crushed cookies

instructions: Mash 2 bananas in a bowl and set aside.
In another bowl, whisk together coconut milk, honey, eggs, and 1 tsp of curry.
Add the mashed bananas to the wet mixture and stir to combine.
Mix in the dense cake crumbs.
Spoon the mixture into a mini muffin tin.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out clean.
